ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Inc.: `Academie Otiosorum tantum debeo, ut nihil vehementius cogitem...` Expl.: `... ut si mihi in eo par sis magno me beneficio et gaudio affeceris. Vale`
ItacWorkItem.Shelfmark: Harry Ransom Center Ranuzzi MSS Ph 12670
ItacWorkItem.Notes: This letter is particularly important as it was written the same year of Vizzani`s death.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
